description: Non-blocking combinations that deserve human review because the policy line is subtle.

educationPaidUseBoundary.title: Educational reuse and paid course boundaries need explicit scope.
educationPaidUseBoundary.message: Clarify paid teachers, paid schools, bootcamps, YouTube courses, internal corporate training, and certification programs.

protectedPatentComfort.title: Protected preset includes patent comfort without opening commercial or SaaS rights.
protectedPatentComfort.message: P1 improves enterprise review comfort while NC, S0, NT, and resale limits preserve the creator-protective posture.
